---
name: 📚 Documentation Issue
about: Report issues with documentation or suggest improvements
title: "[DOCS] "
labels: ["documentation", "needs-review"]
assignees: ""
---

## 📚 Documentation Issue

### Type of Documentation Issue

- [ ] 🐛 Error or inaccuracy in existing documentation
- [ ] 📝 Missing documentation for existing feature
- [ ] ✨ New documentation needed
- [ ] 🔄 Update needed due to feature changes
- [ ] 🎨 Improvement to existing documentation
- [ ] 🔗 Broken or outdated links

## 📍 Location

**Affected Documentation:**

- File/Page: [e.g., README.md, API documentation, etc.]
- Section: [e.g., Installation, Configuration, etc.]
- URL: [if applicable]

## 🔍 Current Issue

### What's Wrong?

A clear description of the issue with the current documentation.

### Expected Information

What information should be included or corrected?

## 💡 Suggested Improvement

### Proposed Changes

Describe what changes you think should be made.

### Additional Content Needed

- [ ] Code examples
- [ ] Screenshots/diagrams
- [ ] Step-by-step tutorials
- [ ] API reference updates
- [ ] Configuration examples
- [ ] Troubleshooting guides

## 🎯 Audience

Who would benefit from this documentation improvement?

- [ ] 👨‍💻 Developers (new contributors)
- [ ] 🏢 System administrators
- [ ] 👥 End users
- [ ] 🎓 Students/learners
- [ ] 🔧 DevOps engineers

## 📋 Context

### Use Case

Describe the scenario where this documentation would be helpful.

### Current Workaround

If there's a current way to find this information, describe it.

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Documentation issue clearly identified
- [ ] Proposed solution reviewed
- [ ] Content written/updated
- [ ] Technical accuracy verified
- [ ] Grammar and style checked
- [ ] Examples tested (if applicable)
- [ ] Cross-references updated
- [ ] Stakeholder review completed

## 🔗 Related Issues

- Related to: #[issue number]
- Depends on: #[issue number]

## 💬 Additional Context

Add any other context, examples, or suggestions here.
